title: Bardo States (Intermediate States After Death)
description: The three intermediate states between death and rebirth described in the Tibetan Book of the Dead: the Chikhai Bardo (moment of death, clear light), the Chonyid Bardo (encounter with peaceful and wrathful deities, ~14 days), and the Sidpa Bardo (transition to rebirth, ~35 days). The bardo is both a post-mortem geography and a model for meditative experience during life.
